---
title: "Contact"
---

## Guannan Gong, PhD

**Associate Research Scientist**  
Department of Medical Oncology and Hematology  
Yale School of Medicine  
Yale Cancer Center

**Email:** [guannan.gong@yale.edu](mailto:guannan.gong@yale.edu)  
**Phone:** (203) 200-2328

**Office address**  
Yale Cancer Center  
333 Cedar Street  
New Haven, CT 06510

---

## Links

- [Yale School of Medicine profile](https://medicine.yale.edu/profile/guannan-gong/)
- [Yale CBB profile](https://cbb.yale.edu/people/guannan-gong)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4972-6705)
- [CtrlTrial](https://www.ctrltrial.com/)

---

## Collaboration inquiries

For research collaborations, data partnerships, or clinical trial informatics projects, please email Dr. Gong directly. For trainee and student opportunities, see [Join the Lab](join.qmd).
